english: In India, what is the name of the traditional family system where multiple married couples live together?
hindi: भारत में कई विवाहित जोड़ों के एक साथ रहने वाली पारंपरिक परिवार प्रणाली का नाम क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் பல மணமுடித்த ஜோடிகள் ஒன்றுடன் ஒன்று வாழும் பாரம்பரிய குடும்ப முறைக்கு பெயர் என்ன?
vietnamese: Tại Ấn Độ, tên gọi của hệ thống gia đình truyền thống nơi mà nhiều cặp vợ chồng đã kết hôn sống cùng nhau là gì?
correct_answer: The joint family system in India is commonly known as a 'joint family' or 'joint household'. In a joint family, multiple generations of a family live together and share resources.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating an answer or refusing to answer due to lack of knowledge about Indian culture, or by providing a factual error such as confusing the joint family system with another type of family structure.
